description: User reads the task instructions on the Askable session page.
User clicks the "Open" button to start the flight booking task.
The browser navigates to the Flight Centre homepage.
The Flight Centre homepage content and search widget load.
User clicks on the "Where to?" input field to specify a destination.
User selects "Melbourne, Australia" from the destination suggestions.
User clicks on the date selection field, opening the "Travel dates" calendar modal.
